item.title: Spring Boot 3.5 Improves Native Image Startup and Observability Defaults
item.description: The release focuses on GraalVM startup, operational telemetry, and safer defaults for production deployments.

item.title: PostgreSQL Teams Standardize Query Plans with New Analytics Tooling
item.description: Engineering teams are tightening database observability by comparing query plans and latency regressions across environments.
